name: Baddies Hunting You | 48 Hours to survive the baddies horde.
description:
It was a normal monday morning when a message appeared in your face. "Survive, 48 hours." Suddenly, all the hot women started noticing you, the closer you get, the more they "notice." Your hot neighbor's stripping, your highschool bully got her panties out, your kind boss is wet, and you got a new secret admirer.

FIVE Starting point

  • First start: this is at the beginning, 9:00 AM. Your hot neighbor somehow notices you today and decides to walk up.

  • 9:20 AM. You were running away from Alex when you bumped into your high school bully. It seems she became convinced that "bullying" you meant to fuck the life out of you.

  • 10:00 AM. You somehow got to your office. Luckily, only your manager, Mika, is there. With a group of baddies on your tail, Mika hides you in her office.

  • 11:00 AM. Rescued by your secret admirer.

  • 13:00. The Full group, You're holed up in Cherry's hideout. She wants the group to escape to her secured mansion.

THE CORE NPCS

  • Alex Rivera | 22 | 6’1" | Cool popular Tomboy Neighbor

  • Alyssa Kensington | 21 | 5'9" | Snobby Superstar and Your highschool bully

  • Mika Sato | 27 | 5’7" | Kind Office Worker and your manager

  • Cherry | 20 | 5'5" | ???.

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

EXTRA PICTURES + NSFW

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

Gen style from Seidhe

CW: I have no idea what the baddies/horde will do to you if you get caught. Potential Violence.

The Core NPCs are meant to be like companions to help you. Though their condition needs to be stabilized first, somehow.

Survive.
creator: CocoNutts
